---
title: Macrofinance
author: Hirotaka Fukui
date: 2025/8/26
format: html
lang: en
code-fold: true
engine: julia
---

## Single-Agent Consumption-Portfolio Choice

## Stochastic Control Methods in Continuous Time

There are three well-known methods to solve stochastic control problem.

1. Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) Equation

2. Stochastic Maximum Principle

3. Martingale Method
